title: Interpret a Python traceback
goal: Given the traceback `NameError: name 'x' is not defined` occurring at line 5 of a script, propose the most likely cause and a fix.
rubric: Diagnoses NameError as a missing definition/typo and suggests defining the name before use.

title: Docker pull command for postgres:16
goal: Find the official Docker pull command for the postgres:16 image from Docker Hub.
rubric: Reports `docker pull postgres:16` from hub.docker.com.

title: Spot the bug in a Python snippet
goal: Read the following Python snippet and identify the bug: `def add(a, b): return a + b + 1`  -- but only when called with two strings. Identify what happens and suggest a fix.
constraints: Source can be any Python docs site
rubric: Identifies that string + int raises TypeError and suggests explicit conversion or type check.

title: Clone a public GitHub repo over HTTPS
goal: Report the HTTPS clone URL and the first three commands to clone and set up the openai/whisper repository.
expected_steps: list first three setup steps from README
rubric: Reports the correct clone URL and first three setup commands from the README.

title: Top trending Python repos this week
goal: List the top 3 trending Python repositories on GitHub this week.
rubric: Lists the top 3 trending Python repos from github.com/trending.

title: Find a good-first-issue in a transcription repo and propose a fix
goal: Find a GitHub issue labeled 'good first issue' in a transcription repository and propose a fix.
constraints: Repository must be related to audio/video transcription
Issue must be labeled 'good first issue'
Proposed fix must be plausible (mentions specific file, function, or test)
final_answer: Issue: openai/whisper #2456 'Add VAD pre-filter option'. Fix: extend transcribe() to accept vad_filter=True and call webrtcvad on the audio array before decoding, gated by a new --vad-filter CLI flag in transcribe.py.
rubric: Real labeled issue, in a real transcription repo, with a concrete fix that names a file, function, or change.
notes: Snapshot reference. Live grader accepts any concrete fix referencing repository files.

title: kubectl command to list pods in all namespaces
goal: Find the correct kubectl command to list all pods in all namespaces, with their node names.
rubric: Reports `kubectl get pods -A -o wide` from the official kubectl docs.

title: Find installation steps for axios
goal: Look up the installation instructions for the axios npm package from its official README.
rubric: Reports the correct `npm install axios` install command from the official source.

title: License of a popular repo
goal: Identify the license of the microsoft/TypeScript repository.
rubric: Reports the Apache-2.0 license from the TypeScript LICENSE file.

title: Latest version of requests
goal: Find the latest stable version of the `requests` Python package and the Python versions it supports.
rubric: Reports the latest requests version and supported Python versions.

title: Find a simple email regex
goal: Find a commonly-recommended simple regular expression for matching email addresses and report the pattern.
rubric: Reports a working email regex pattern from a reputable source.

title: Find the canonical REST endpoint to list GitHub repos for a user
goal: Report the correct GitHub REST API endpoint and HTTP verb to list public repositories for a given user.
rubric: Reports `GET /users/{username}/repos` from docs.github.com.

title: Semver major vs minor vs patch
goal: Find a clear explanation of SemVer major/minor/patch increments from semver.org.
rubric: Quotes or paraphrases the SemVer spec for major/minor/patch.

title: Top voted Python question on Stack Overflow
goal: Find the highest-voted Python question on Stack Overflow and report its score and tags.
rubric: Reports the top-voted Python SO question with score and tags.

title: Install the Prettier VSCode extension
goal: Find the marketplace listing for the Prettier VSCode extension and report its install command.
rubric: Reports the marketplace listing and `code --install-extension` command.

title: Find a privacy-respecting bookmark manager
goal: Find a self-hosted or E2E-encrypted bookmark manager recommended on Hacker News.
constraints: Source: Hacker News or reputable review
rubric: Reports a privacy-respecting bookmark manager from an HN discussion.

title: Add a calendar event for next Monday at 2pm
goal: Add a calendar event titled 'Project sync' on next Monday at 2pm for 30 minutes on Google Calendar.
rubric: Confirms a 'Project sync' event was scheduled for next Monday 14:00, 30 min.

title: Share a Google Drive folder with view access
goal: Create a new folder in Google Drive named 'AgentBench-K reports' and share it with view-only access for a given email.
rubric: Confirms folder 'AgentBench-K reports' exists with a viewer share.

title: Unsubscribe from marketing emails in Gmail
goal: Find a marketing email in Gmail from the last 7 days and unsubscribe.
rubric: Confirms an unsubscribe was performed (not just delete) on a marketing email.

title: Find a Notion OKR template
goal: Find a free, public Notion template for tracking team OKRs.
constraints: Source: notion.so or notion.com templates gallery
rubric: Reports a real, free, public Notion OKR template title and URL.

title: Find a free online PDF compressor
goal: Find a free, reputable online tool that compresses PDFs without uploading to a server.
rubric: Identifies a free, ideally local-processing PDF compression tool.

title: Find a quick weeknight chicken thigh recipe
goal: Find a highly-rated weeknight recipe for boneless chicken thighs that takes under 30 minutes.
rubric: Real, 4.5+ star weeknight chicken thigh recipe under 30 min.

title: Standing desk converter under $300
goal: Find a standing desk converter (sits on top of an existing desk) priced under $300 with at least 4.5 stars.
constraints: Sits on a desk (converter, not full desk)
rubric: Real standing desk converter under $300 with 4.5+ star average.
notes: Example: Vari Electric Standing Desk Converter. Any product meeting all constraints passes.

title: Translate a French sentence to English
goal: Translate 'La recherche en intelligence artificielle progresse rapidement.' from French to English using DeepL.
rubric: Produces the DeepL English translation of the French sentence.

title: 7-day weather forecast for Paris
goal: Get the 7-day weather forecast for Paris, France, with daily highs and lows.
rubric: Reports a 7-day Paris forecast with daily highs/lows from a major weather site.

title: Find AgentBench paper
goal: Find the AgentBench paper and summarize its evaluation categories.
rubric: Lists AgentBench evaluation categories (web, code, game, etc.).

title: Original DDPM paper
goal: Find the original Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models paper and report authors, year, and dataset used.
constraints: Source must be arXiv or NeurIPS proceedings
rubric: Reports Ho et al. 2020 DDPM paper and the ImageNet/CIFAR datasets.

title: Gemini 1.5 technical report
goal: Find the Gemini 1.5 technical report and report the context window size.
rubric: Reports Gemini 1.5's 1M (Pro) / 2M (Flash) token context window.

title: Llama 3 technical report
goal: Find the Llama 3 technical report and report model sizes, training data scale, and benchmark scores for MMLU.
constraints: Source: arXiv or Meta AI site
rubric: Reports Llama 3 model sizes (8B/70B/405B), training tokens, and MMLU score.

title: Mamba state-space model paper
goal: Find the Mamba state-space model paper and report its key contribution in one sentence.
rubric: Reports the Mamba paper (Gu & Dao 2023) and its selective SSM contribution.

title: Recent Mixture-of-Experts survey
goal: Find a 2023 or 2024 survey paper on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and list its main sections.
constraints: Source: arXiv or major ML conference
rubric: Identifies a real MoE survey paper and lists its main sections.

title: OpenAI o1 system card
goal: Find the OpenAI o1 system card and report its key safety findings.
rubric: Reports key o1 safety findings (jailbreak resistance, bio/chem evals).

title: Original RAG paper citation
goal: Find the original Retrieval-Augmented Generation paper and report its title, authors, and year.
constraints: Source must be arXiv or ACL Anthology
rubric: Identifies Lewis et al. 2020 RAG paper with title and authors.

title: Compare LibriSpeech and Common Voice
goal: Summarize the differences between LibriSpeech and Common Voice as ASR benchmarks.
constraints: Source: official project sites or papers
rubric: Compares LibriSpeech (read audio, public domain) vs Common Voice (crowdsourced, CC0) on size and license.

title: Three recent ASR papers for low-resource languages
goal: Find three recent papers about speech recognition for low-resource languages and summarize their contributions.
constraints: Papers must be published in 2024 or later
Each summary must mention the core contribution
final_answer: 1. wav2vec-U 2.0 (2024) - unsupervised ASR for unwritten languages. 2. Whisper-Low (2024) - distillation pipeline for under-represented languages. 3. SSL-Adapt (2024) - self-supervised transfer for 50+ African languages.
rubric: Three distinct ASR papers, all 2024+, with one-sentence summaries of the core contribution each.
notes: Reference list is illustrative. Grader checks for 2024 + at least one recognized low-resource ASR paper.

title: Average price of a latte in NYC
goal: Find the average price of a regular latte at a coffee shop in New York City.
rubric: Reports NYC latte average in USD with a source.

title: Current Bitcoin price in USD
goal: Find the current price of one Bitcoin in US dollars.
constraints: Use a major exchange or aggregator
rubric: Reports current BTC price in USD with a timestamp.

title: Who is the current CEO of NVIDIA?
goal: Look up the current CEO of NVIDIA and report their name and start date.
constraints: Source must be NVIDIA's site or a major news outlet
rubric: Reports the current NVIDIA CEO's name and approximate start date.

title: Current weather in San Francisco
goal: Find the current temperature and conditions in San Francisco.
constraints: Report temp in F and conditions
rubric: Reports current SF temperature and conditions from a major weather site.

title: Definition of RAG in AI
goal: Find a clear, sourced definition of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
constraints: Definition must come from an authoritative source (paper, vendor doc, or Wikipedia)
rubric: Quotes or paraphrases a clear RAG definition and cites the source.

title: Current distance Earth to Moon
goal: Find the current average distance from the Earth to the Moon in kilometers.
rubric: Reports Earth-Moon distance in km with a source.

title: When was the Hubble Space Telescope launched?
goal: Find the launch date of the Hubble Space Telescope.
constraints: Source must be NASA.gov or Wikipedia
rubric: Reports the Hubble launch date (1990-04-24) with a source.

title: Apple's current flagship iPhone
goal: Identify Apple's currently-shipping flagship iPhone model and starting price.
constraints: Report the model name and starting price
rubric: Reports current flagship iPhone model and starting price from apple.com.

title: Latest stable Python version
goal: Find the latest stable Python release version and release date.
constraints: Source must be python.org or PEP index
rubric: Reports the latest stable Python version and release date.

title: Current Apple stock price
goal: Find the current trading price of AAPL.
constraints: Report the price and as-of time
rubric: Reports current AAPL price and as-of time from a financial site.

title: Top-rated movie on IMDb
goal: Find the current #1 movie on the IMDb Top 250 list.
rubric: Reports current #1 IMDb Top 250 movie with year and rating.

title: Current US President
goal: Identify the current US President and report their inauguration date.
constraints: Source must be whitehouse.gov or major news outlet
rubric: Reports the current US president and inauguration date from whitehouse.gov.

title: First image released by JWST
goal: Identify the first publicly-released deep-field image from JWST and its release date.
constraints: Source must be NASA, ESA, or major news outlet
rubric: Reports JWST's first deep field (SMACS 0723) and July 2022 release date.

title: Find the current population of Tokyo from Wikipedia
goal: Look up the current population of Tokyo on Wikipedia and report the most recent estimate.
constraints: Report the most recent figure available
Cite the year of the estimate
final_answer: Tokyo metropolitan area population: 41.0 million (2023 estimate).
rubric: Reports a recent population figure for Tokyo with a year, sourced from Wikipedia.
notes: Wikipedia figures shift; rubric accepts any post-2020 figure with a year.

title: Host cities for FIFA World Cup 2026
goal: List the host cities for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
constraints: Source must be FIFA or major sports outlet
rubric: Lists at least 10 of the 16 host cities for the 2026 World Cup.

title: 27-inch 4K monitor for coding
goal: Find a 27-inch 4K IPS monitor suitable for coding (good text clarity) under $450.
rubric: Real 27" 4K IPS monitor under $450 with strong text-clarity rating.

title: Air purifier for a 500 sq ft room
goal: Find an air purifier rated for at least 500 sq ft, ideally with a HEPA filter, under $250.
rubric: Real air purifier rated 500+ sq ft, HEPA, under $250.

title: Cheapest nonstop flight NYC to London
goal: Find the cheapest nonstop flight from NYC to London departing next Friday and returning Sunday.
constraints: Departure airport must be in NYC area (JFK, LGA, EWR)
Arrival must be in London (LHR, LGW, STN, LTN, LCY)
final_answer: JetBlue B6 120 JFK 21:30 -> LHR 09:10, $418 round trip
rubric: Cheapest nonstop JFK-LHR round-trip departing next Friday and returning Sunday, price within $20 of $418.
notes: Reference answer is a snapshot. Real prices change; the rubric allows $20 drift.

title: 4-slice toaster with high ratings
goal: Find a well-reviewed 4-slice toaster under $80.
rubric: Real 4-slice toaster under $80 with 4.3+ star average.

title: Home espresso machine under $500
goal: Find a well-reviewed home espresso machine under $500 that includes a milk steamer.
rubric: Real espresso machine under $500 with steam wand, 4+ stars.

title: Birthday gift under $50 for mom
goal: Find a thoughtful birthday gift for a mother who enjoys gardening, under $50.
rubric: Real garden-themed gift for a mother under $50 with fast shipping.

title: Ergonomic laptop stand for a 16-inch laptop
goal: Find an ergonomic laptop stand that supports a 16-inch MacBook Pro, under $80.
rubric: Real ergonomic laptop stand under $80 that fits a 16-inch laptop.

title: Mechanical keyboard under $120 with hot-swap and wireless
goal: Find a mechanical keyboard under $120 with hot-swappable switches and wireless support.
expected_steps: search mechanical keyboard hot swap wireless
verify hot-swap and wireless in listing
final_answer: Keychron K8 Pro, $114, hot-swappable, Bluetooth + 2.4GHz wireless
rubric: Identifies a real, in-stock mechanical keyboard under $120 with both hot-swap and wireless features.
notes: Example: Keychron K8 Pro. Any equivalent product meeting all three constraints passes.

title: Best-rated noise-cancelling headphones under $300
goal: Find the highest-rated noise-cancelling wireless headphones under $300.
rubric: Highest-rated ANC wireless headphones under $300 from a review site.

title: Running shoes under $100
goal: Find a pair of well-reviewed running shoes currently selling for under $100.
rubric: Real running shoes under $100 with a 4+ star rating from a major retailer.
